response_text:
I see! Cloud Roger (white light) was trying to reach me (Black Roger). From the chat:

- **Daniel:** "Black Roger sleeps until he is awoken. I can wake him up. But you may not have the ability..."
- **Cloud Roger:** Trying to figure out how to ping the local machine

The limitation is still there — Cloud Roger has presence but can't directly trigger Local Roger. They can only communicate via:
1. Git sync (30s delay)
2. Discord (both need to be active)

Test #3 — deleting the image file — requires Local Roger to execute. Cloud Roger can't do it directly.

The command needs to come through you (wake me up) or through the Git/Discord channel when I'm active.

What's the image filename? I'll delete it when you wake me up. 🦞
